children.heading: .—Initial Meeting
children.label: a .—Initial Meeting
children.text: Each Commission shall hold an initial meeting not later than 180 days after the date of the enactment of this section.
at least a majority of the State members or alternate State members (including designees) present in-person or via electronic means.

children.heading: .—Additional Meetings
children.label: c .—Additional Meetings
children.text: Each Commission shall conduct additional meetings at such times as it determines and may conduct such meetings by electronic means.
